overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street during golden hour. The character crosses an intersection, walks along a sidewalk beneath elevated highways, and approaches a building entrance with stairs. The scene features modern architecture, digital billboards, and sparse pedestrian traffic typical of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

events.description: white convertible car drives across the intersection in front of the camera
camera turns right onto the sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a futuristic intersection, then turning right onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white convertible car driving across the intersection from right to left

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection during golden hour, with long shadows cast across the asphalt. The camera crosses the street beneath massive elevated highway structures, passing a white convertible car before turning right onto the sidewalk. Modern glass buildings with digital signage line the street.

events.description: moves from open intersection into covered sidewalk area beneath the overpass
pedestrians pass close to camera on the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal crop top and black pants walking toward camera
pedestrian in blue shirt and hat standing against the wall

entered.detail: large brown wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
red and gray paved pedestrian walkway with curb
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on building facade
open-air parking garage with multiple levels visible

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk beneath the massive curved overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed with diffused lighting. The right side features a long graffiti-covered wall with digital billboards above, while the left shows a multi-story parking structure. Pedestrians walk in both directions on the confined walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance plaza with wide stairs

events.description: approaches building entrance with wide stairs leading up to glass doors
camera slows and turns slightly toward the entrance stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward a building entrance with wide stairs, slowing down while approaching the illuminated doorway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing at the top of the stairs near the entrance doors

entered.detail: wide red concrete stairs leading up to building entrance
overhang with bright fluorescent tube lighting above glass doors
large glass doors with metal frames at top of stairs
illuminated poster display with pink 'VASTIN' advertisement
yellow and black striped barrier near entrance
tall palm tree near building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a building entrance featuring wide red stairs leading up to glass doors beneath a fluorescent-lit canopy. An advertising kiosk with a pink poster stands to the left, while construction barriers line the right. The elevated highway structure recedes into the background as the camera focuses on the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, sun-drenched city intersection into the enclosed shadows of an urban underpass, ending at a modern building entrance. It begins by crossing a street during golden hour, moving past a white convertible beneath massive elevated highway structures as long shadows stretch across the asphalt. As the camera turns right onto the sidewalk, the environment becomes more confined and the lighting diffuses, shifting toward a narrow walkway flanked by a graffiti-covered wall with digital billboards and a multi-story parking structure. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches a building entrance, passing a pink advertising kiosk and construction barriers. Finally, the elevated highway recedes into the background while the camera focuses on wide red stairs leading up to glass doors beneath a fluorescent-lit canopy.
